steps.title: Substitute the line value
steps.content:
From $y+3=0$, the line is $y=-3$. Substitute into the quadratic equation:
$$-3=2x^2-20x+54$$
$$2x^2-20x+57=0$$

steps.title: Check the discriminant
steps.content:
Use the discriminant to count real intersections:
$$(-20)^2-4(2)(57)=400-456=-56$$

steps.title: Count the real solutions
steps.content: Because the discriminant is negative, the quadratic has no real solutions, so the system has no solutions. The answer is D.
